title: BigID Data Source
description: Schema describing a BigID data source connection. Used as the body for POST /api/v1/ds_connections and as a member of the list returned by GET /api/v1/ds-connections.

name.description: Display name for the data source.

type.description: Connector template type (e.g. rdb-mysql, s3-v2, snowflake, sharepoint-online).

location.description: Hostname or URI of the data source.

username.description: Username used to authenticate with the data source.

password.description: Password used to authenticate with the data source. Stored encrypted by BigID.

scope.description: Optional scope restricting which schemas, tables, or objects to scan.

enabled.description: Whether the data source is enabled for scanning.

scanner_group.description: Scanner group that should perform scans for this data source.
